/usr/bin/ar qc ../lib/libatbus.a CMakeFiles/atbus.dir/detail/buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atbus.dir/detail/libatbus_error.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atbus.dir/atbus_connection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atbus.dir/atbus_topology.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atbus.dir/atbus_endpoint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atbus.dir/atbus_message_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atbus.dir/atbus_connection_context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atbus.dir/atbus_node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atbus.dir/channel_io_stream.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atbus.dir/channel_mem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atbus.dir/channel_shm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atbus.dir/channel_utility.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atbus.dir/libatbus_protocol.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../lib/libatbus.a
